summary: District-level peanut production summary register from Incahuasi ('Khipu Mani'). 169 cords, 9 colors, 33 clusters. Grand total 556,242 = ~60x larger than companion UR270 ('Quipu del Mani', total 9,209), indicating HIGHER ADMINISTRATIVE LEVEL. Constant 208 appears on 19 cords (15% of L1, all identical S100+S100+L8, 79% on NB color) = reference marker (tribute unit/sack size). Only 3 STRING (all qaqa, 100% hits). Red tassel + needlework bundle = important official document. Same excavation area as UR278 (astronomical), UR270 (peanut warehouse), UR277 (inventory).
interpretation:
IDENTIFICATION
  169 cords (L1: 131, L2: 36, L3: 1, L4: 1). Architecture: 0-SEUL, 33 clusters.
  9 colors: W(77), NB(34), AB(24), MB(24), GG(4), ?(3), LB(1), BS(1), KB(1).
  Nickname: 'Khipu Mani' — second peanut khipu (UR270 is 'Quipu del Mani').
  Excavation: Sector A, Subsector 1, UA 4, Unidad 20N, UE 18.
  Same area as UR278 (UE16), UR270 (UE13), UR277 (UE17).
  Special: needlework bundle + red tassel at beginning = important document.
  3 STRING (100% hits — all qaqa), 108 INT, 34 EMPTY (20%), 24 L-1 (14%).

THE 208 CONSTANT — KEY DISCOVERY
  19 cords with value EXACTLY 208, all with identical knot structure: S?(kvt=100) + S?(kvt=100) + L?(kvt=8).
  79% on NB (near-black) color. Present in 19/33 sections (58%).
  Spacing: every 4-8 cords in sections 2-8.
  208 = REFERENCE CONSTANT embedded in the register.
  Possible: standard tribute unit, sack/container size, section marker, or proportional divisor.

VOCABULARY
  Only qaqa (rock/mountain) x3, with S-prefix values 8140, 13160, 1140 — LABELS on extremely large numbers, not geographic descriptions.

STRUCTURE — 33 PRODUCTION ZONES
  Declining trend: Section 1 sum=26,648, Section 33 sum=7,475 (~3.5x decrease).
  Grand total: 556,242. Non-zero L1: 112/131 (85%). Mean per cord: 4,966.

THE FOUR KHIPUS OF SECTOR A (INCAHUASI)
  UE 13: UR270 'Quipu del Mani' — Peanut WAREHOUSE ledger (25 years, total 9,209)
  UE 16: UR278 — Astronomical OBSERVATORY (162 years, 26x9 matrix)
  UE 17: UR277 — Short-term INVENTORY (15 years, AB/NB bicolor)
  UE 18: UR268 'Khipu Mani' — Peanut DISTRICT SUMMARY (total 556,242, 208 constant)

UR268 vs UR270 — SCALE COMPARISON
  UR268 total 556,242 vs UR270 total 9,209 = 60x ratio.
  UR268 typical values 8,000-13,000 vs UR270 typical 100-240.
  UR268 has 208 constant (x19) vs UR270 has none.
  UR268 has red tassel (official) vs UR270 has none.
  UR268 = district SUMMARY that aggregates UR270-type warehouse data.
  If 33 sections represent 33 warehouses, average ~17,000/section is consistent with multiple UR270-size ledgers.
references: Sivan 2026, ALBA Project — District-level peanut production analysis, 208 constant discovery
Urton & Chu 2013 — Incahuasi excavation, Sector A khipus found with peanuts
Incahuasi — Inca military/administrative base, southern coast conquest (~1470s)
